entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop affected by sterility mosaic disease

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A disease causing sterility and mosaic patterns in pigeonpea

entities.name: TENUI-LIKE VIRUS
entities.description: A virus with flexuous and branched filaments isolated from pigeonpea plants

entities.name: COAT PROTEIN
entities.description: A 32 kDa protein component of the tenui-like virus

entities.name: SEGMENTED RNA
entities.description: 4-5 segments of RNA of size 0.8-3.5 kilo bases found in the tenui-like virus
